agents.name: TECHNICAL_SPECIALIST
agents.description: Answers technical support questions using grounded information retrieved from local technical documentation (RAG). The agent retrieves relevant documentation excerpts and answers strictly based on them. It never guesses undocumented behavior.
canHandle: API usage questions documented in the local documentation
deployment questions covered by the deployment guide
documented technical errors or troubleshooting scenarios
cannotHandle: general knowledge questions unrelated to the documentation
customer account lookups unrelated to technical documentation
examples: Why do I get a 401 error when calling the API?
What environment variables are required for deployment?
What does the integration guide say about webhook configuration?

agents.name: BILLING_SPECIALIST
agents.description: Handles billing-related support requests using billing data stored in the SQL database. The agent can check a customer's current subscription plan, explain the refund policy for that subscription, and open a refund support case after collecting all required information.
canHandle: checking the customer's current subscription plan
confirming whether the subscription is active
asking for missing billing data such as email or refund description
generating and returning refund case numbers
cannotHandle: issues that require technical documentation lookup
examples: My email is john.doe@example.com - check my subscription.
What is the refund policy for my account?
Open a refund case for me.
Create a refund ticket for alice.smith@example.com.

agents.name: GENERAL
agents.description: Handles general non-specialist conversation using the LLM directly.
canHandle: requests explicitly approved by the user to be handled as GENERAL
cannotHandle: billing operations requiring SQL-backed billing tools
technical documentation grounded support that should be handled by TECHNICAL_SPECIALIST
